title: Trimmed Tools
description: Allows tools and weapons to become trimmable!
body:
Hi everyone!

This mixture of Datapack and Resource Pack allows for tools and weapons to become trimmable as well! Any trim can be used on any tool (Shears, Flint and Steel, Hoe, Axe, Pickaxe, Shovel) or any weapon (Sword, Mace, Bow, Crossbow, Trident). Just like the Armor, these can be made on the Smithing Table.
